---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for modern-pdf-lib
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would enable.

## Proposed API

```ts
// How you envision the API looking
import { PdfDocument } from 'modern-pdf-lib';

const doc = PdfDocument.create();
// ...
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.
